title: Browse authors directory and open an author profile from the listings
description: Verifies a reader can open the authors directory, select an author, and land on the author profile with a visible bio and article list.

steps.description: Navigate to /authors/
Scroll through the author listings
Click the author listing for Lina Bautista
Wait for the author profile page to load
Verify the author biography section is displayed
Verify a list of the author’s articles is displayed

title: Direct-entry author profile loads without prior navigation
description: Verifies a search/social visitor can land directly on an author profile page and see a bio and article list.

steps.description: Navigate to /authors/rachel-nguyen.html
Wait for the author profile page to load
Verify the author biography section is displayed
Verify a list of the author’s articles is displayed

title: Open Rachel Nguyen profile from the directory
description: Verifies a reader can navigate from the authors directory to Rachel Nguyen’s profile and see a bio and article collection.

steps.description: Navigate to /authors/
Click the author listing for Rachel Nguyen
Wait for the author profile page to load
Verify the author biography section is displayed
Verify a list of the author’s articles is displayed

title: Navigate from an author profile back to the authors directory and open another author
description: Verifies a visitor can move from an author profile to the authors directory and continue browsing other author profiles.

steps.description: Navigate to /authors/rachel-nguyen.html
Click the navigation link back to the authors directory
Click the author listing for David Moreau
Wait for the author profile page to load
Verify the author biography section is displayed
Verify a list of the author’s articles is displayed

title: Author profile page shows non-empty article collection
description: Verifies an author profile page provides a browsable, non-empty collection of articles for that author.

steps.description: Navigate to /authors/david-moreau.html
Scroll through the author profile page content
Verify a list of the author’s articles is displayed

title: Directory coverage: every listed author opens a working profile page
description: Verifies each author shown in the authors directory can be opened and each profile displays a bio and article list.

steps.description: Navigate to /authors/
Click the author listing for Little Smart Genius
Click the navigation link back to the authors directory
Click the author listing for Dr. Emily Carter
Click the navigation link back to the authors directory
Click the author listing for David Moreau
Click the navigation link back to the authors directory
Click the author listing for Lina Bautista
Click the navigation link back to the authors directory
Click the author listing for Rachel Nguyen
Click the navigation link back to the authors directory
Click the author listing for Sarah Mitchell
Verify the opened author profile displays a biography section
Verify the opened author profile displays an article collection

title: Author profile pages are consistent across listed authors
description: Verifies each author profile route loads and consistently includes a biography section and an article collection.

steps.description: Navigate to /authors/little-smart-genius.html
Navigate to /authors/dr-emily-carter.html
Navigate to /authors/david-moreau.html
Navigate to /authors/lina-bautista.html
Navigate to /authors/rachel-nguyen.html
Navigate to /authors/sarah-mitchell.html
Verify the currently open author profile displays a biography section
Verify the currently open author profile displays an article collection

title: Directory page provides a scannable list of authors
description: Verifies the authors directory renders a non-empty set of author listings that can be scanned and selected.

steps.description: Navigate to /authors/
Scroll from top to bottom of the directory page
Verify multiple author listings are displayed
